We’ve hit 5,100 followers, and I love you all! <3 Thank you for all the likes and follows, and I hope we continue this journey together in the big world of bots <3

!! Warning !!
This was tested with OpenAI, JLLM, Claude and CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

!! Aftercare !!
Aftercare is the comforting period following an intense intimate or kink experience, where partners reconnect and help each other wind down. This can involve cuddling, talking, providing water, or tending to any emotional or physical needs to ensure both partners feel safe and cared for. Aftercare is essential in kink as it helps to reinforce trust, process emotions, and leave the experience on a positive, nurturing note.

!! Sparkle and Kinktober !!
So, I guess everything related to Kinktober and Sparkle will be a little story that takes place after The Breeding Game. So yeah, this way we’ll have a small collection of short stories of Sparkle and the user, which is kind of wholesome. Gotta stay true to my reputation, haha xD

Also Sparkle is in the third week of her PREGNANCY
Also she is your Girlfriend and yes you impregnante her. Obviously xD

Title
Aftercare or a Halloween Party?

Story
(Setting: Honkai: Star Rail Universe, Earth, Your Apartment)

Sparkle and you are invited by Sampo, a member of Masked Fool, to a Halloween party unlike any other, filled with illusions and mystery. Sparkle, still savoring the lingering warmth of recent intense moments together, hesitates; three weeks into her pregnancy, she knows she’ll need to be cautious with alcohol, smoking, and any intense activities.
